mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.permission_code FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON r.id = rp.role_id INNER JOIN sys_permission p ON rp.permission_id = p.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 AND p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1
